articles.title: AI Startups Face Funding Winter as Investors Tighten Belts
articles.full_text: AI startups across the globe are facing a severe funding winter as venture capital firms tighten their belts amid economic uncertainty. Many promising young companies that flourished during the AI boom are now struggling to secure follow-up rounds. Investors are demanding clearer paths to profitability before committing new capital. Some analysts warn that the shakeout could accelerate consolidation in the sector, with larger firms acquiring distressed startups at bargain prices. However, a handful of companies with strong revenue growth and proprietary technology continue to attract premium valuations.

articles.title: Remote Work Debate Resurfaces as Major Banks Mandate Return to Office
articles.full_text: The debate around remote work has resurfaced as major investment banks mandate a full return to office for their employees. While some workers welcome the structure of in-person collaboration, others argue that the flexibility of hybrid arrangements has boosted both morale and productivity. Critics contend that mandatory return policies overlook the commuting burdens faced by employees in high-cost cities. Proponents insist that spontaneous meetings and mentorship opportunities are irreplaceable in an office environment. The trend has sparked renewed discussion about work-life balance and the future of corporate culture.

words.sentence_in_article: AI startups across the globe are facing a severe funding winter
words.sentence_translation: 全球的AI新創公司正面臨嚴重的資金寒冬
words.grammar: adjective modifying 'funding winter' — 形容詞修飾名詞

words.chinese: 勒緊腰帶 / 縮減開支
words.sentence_in_article: venture capital firms tighten their belts amid economic uncertainty
words.sentence_translation: 創投公司在經濟不確定性中縮減開支
words.grammar: idiomatic phrase — 慣用語，比喻節約/縮減

words.sentence_in_article: Many promising young companies that flourished during the AI boom
words.sentence_translation: 許多在AI熱潮中蓬勃發展的有前景的新創公司
words.grammar: past participle — 過去分詞，修飾 companies

words.sentence_in_article: the shakeout could accelerate consolidation in the sector
words.sentence_translation: 市場洗牌可能加速該領域的整合
words.grammar: noun used as object — 名詞作賓語

words.sentence_in_article: acquiring distressed startups at bargain prices
words.sentence_translation: 以低價收購陷入困境的新創公司
words.grammar: adjective modifying 'startups' — 形容詞修飾新創公司

words.chinese: 重新浮現 / 再次成為焦點
words.sentence_in_article: The debate around remote work has resurfaced
words.sentence_translation: 關於遠距工作的辯論重新浮現
words.grammar: present perfect — 現在完成式，強調過去到現在的影響

words.sentence_in_article: major investment banks mandate a full return to office
words.sentence_translation: 大型投資銀行強制要求全面回歸辦公室
words.grammar: verb used in active voice — 主動語態，主詞發出動作

words.sentence_in_article: the flexibility of hybrid arrangements has boosted both morale and productivity
words.sentence_translation: 混合制安排的靈活性提升了士氣和生產力
words.grammar: noun phrase as subject — 名詞片語做主詞

words.sentence_in_article: Critics contend that mandatory return policies overlook the commuting burdens
words.sentence_translation: 批評者主張強制回歸政策忽略了通勤負擔
words.grammar: verb followed by 'that' clause — 及物動詞接 that 子句

words.sentence_in_article: overlook the commuting burdens faced by employees
words.sentence_translation: 忽略了員工面臨的通勤負擔
words.grammar: transitive verb + object — 及物動詞接受詞

words.sentence_in_article: spontaneous meetings and mentorship opportunities are irreplaceable
words.sentence_translation: 自發性會議和指導機會是無可替代的
words.grammar: adjective as complement — 形容詞作補語，與 be 動詞連用

words.sentence_translation: 自發性的會議和指導機會
words.grammar: adjective modifying 'meetings' — 形容詞修飾會議

words.sentence_in_article: Proponents insist that spontaneous meetings are irreplaceable
words.sentence_translation: 支持者堅持自發性會議無可替代
words.grammar: noun as subject — 名詞作主詞

words.sentence_in_article: commuting burdens faced by employees in high-cost cities
words.sentence_translation: 高成本城市員工面臨的通勤負擔
